label: 按连通性转多值网格
description: 对网格列表中每个网格，将4连通区域各自赋予唯一整数值，把单值网格转为多值网格，起始值自动取网格最大值+1。
description-en: Labels each 4-connected region in every grid of the input list with a unique integer, converting single-value grids to multi-value grids; the starting ID is automatically set to max(grid)+1.
icon: 俯视网格图，内部多个区块各自用不同深浅色块填充，表示连通分量标记，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 网格列表
inputs.description: 输入网格列表，每个元素为一个网格，将对其中各4连通区域赋予唯一整数值
inputs.description-en: List of input grids; each grid's 4-connected regions will be labeled with unique integer values.

inputs.name: filterValue
inputs.label: 过滤值
inputs.description: 作为边界的值，该值视为隔断，不参与连通性计算，保持原值不变
inputs.description-en: The boundary value treated as a barrier; cells with this value are excluded from connectivity and kept as-is.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 多值网格列表
outputs.description: 与输入等长，每个网格中各4连通区域被赋予唯一整数值，起始值为原网格最大值+1
outputs.description-en: Same-length list; each grid has its 4-connected regions labeled with unique integers starting from max(grid)+1.
